title: Gate-state: inherited tree soft-only for heartbeat visibility curation
body: Gate-state before claim: practice:fitness:informational exits 0 with SOFT (20 soft, 21 healthy), hard 0, critical 0. Active commit queue is empty; only stale Feathered/Torrid implementation claims remain outside this docs/PDR/SKILL curation boundary. This pass preserves substance and homes one due item; fitness is routing evidence, not the objective.
